case_title: TAT KWONG CHOW VS. SACHIKO HOTCHKISS

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-03-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HOTCHKISS, SACHIKO

"THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. NO FURTHER ACTION TAKEN BY THE COURT. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM ARISING OUT OF THIS INCIDENT WAS ADJUDICATED ON NOVEMBER 15, 2012 IN CASE # CSM-12-841878", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER--ALVIN LOW. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHOW, TAT KWONG ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY CHOW, TAT KWONG AS TO DEFENDANT HOTCHKISS, SACHIKO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-26-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS CANTONESE INTERPRETER--ANTHONY H. TAM WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR CLERICAL ERROR ON TIME OF HEARING, SHOULD HAVE BEEN 3:30PM INSTEAD OF 1:30PM HEARING SET FOR APR-26-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHOW, TAT KWONG AS TO DEFENDANT HOTCHKISS, SACHIKO
